mdRecord.dcterms:title: James C. Biddle to Gertrude G. Meredith, December 11, 1861
mdRecord.dcterms:description: First Lieutenant James C. Biddle writes to Gertrude G. Meredith from Fort Hatteras, North Carolina, discussing a meeting with Navy Captain Jeffers, a strong storm, sighting a steamship with unknown orders, matters of duty and love, and Christmas gifts.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Civil War
United States--History--Civil War, 1861-1865
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
mdRecord.dcterms:creator: Biddle, James C.
